settings.text: • Minimizes hair fall • Supports hair growth
One oil for complete hair recovery
Made by BAMS doctors in our GMP & ISO - certified facility. FDA compliant and AYUSH licensed.

settings.quote: "Hair fall reduced noticeably, and I can already see tiny baby hairs coming"
settings.author: - ANU R., CHENNAI

settings.text: Hair recovery needs two wins - reduce the fall and support new growth. Most oils address one. Neelibhringadi works both sides.

settings.description_block: Neeli cools scalp inflammation that weakens follicles. Bhringaraja activates dormant roots. Amla fortifies the shaft from within. The triple-milk base carries all three deeper than a standard oil carrier - processed over eleven days to bind the herbal essence to the oil.

settings.label: FIRST APPLICATION
settings.title: Scalp cools immediately
settings.body: The Neeli acts immediately. Oil absorbs without heaviness.

settings.label: ~ 8 USES
settings.title: Less in the shower
settings.body: Fall reduction is the first signal. The follicle is strengthening.

settings.label: ~ 36 USES
settings.title: Visible change
settings.body: Three months completes a cycle. Visible density increase at the crown.*

settings.heading: The honest sequence.
settings.text: Root strength comes before visible density.
settings.footnote: *Based on consistent use as directed. Individual results may vary.

settings.title: Full ingredient list
settings.text:
Oil base
Sesame oil (Sesamum indicum), Coconut oil (Cocos nucifera)

Primary herbs
Neeli (Indigofera tinctoria), Bhringaraja (Eclipta alba), Amla (Emblica officinalis)

Triple-milk base
Coconut milk, Goat milk, Cow milk - a genuine differentiator in Ayurvedic hair oil formulation

Supporting herbs
Manjishtha (Rubia cordifolia), Yashtimadhu (Glycyrrhiza glabra), Haritaki (Terminalia chebula), Vibhitaki (Terminalia bellirica), Jatamansi (Nardostachys jatamansi), Padmaka (Prunus cerasoides), Sariva (Hemidesmus indicus), Nilotpala, Durva, Gunjamoola, Priyangu, Anjana, and Lauha bhasma.

Processed over 7 days using traditional Taila Paka Vidhi (classical oil preparation method).

settings.title: Preparation - 7 days
settings.text:
Preparation

Each batch follows the Sahasrayogam's Taila Paka Vidhi - a classical method requiring 7 days of slow-heat extraction. Herbs are first made into a kashaya (decoction), then combined with the sesame oil base and kalka (paste). The mixture is heated on low flame, monitored by hand, until the water content fully evaporates and the herbal essence binds to the oil. This process cannot be rushed or mechanized.

settings.title: Safety & Interactions
settings.text:
Safety & interactions

External use only. Always patch test before first full application. Pregnant or nursing? Talk to your doctor before starting a new topical regimen - the formula is not tested for this cohort.

settings.title: Frequently asked
settings.text:
When Will I See Results?
Reduced hair fall is typically noticed within 2–3 weeks. Visible improvement in growth and texture requires 2+ months of consistent use. Recovery is a process, not a single event.

Does It Help With Greying?
Yes. Neeli and Bhringaraja are traditionally used to help minimise premature greying and support natural hair colour.

Can I Use It On Coloured Hair?
Yes. The formula is gentle. It may slightly darken hair over extended use due to the Bhringaraja and Neeli content.

Is It Safe During Pregnancy?
This is an external-use oil with no known contraindicated ingredients for topical application. However, as with any product during pregnancy or nursing, we recommend consulting your doctor before starting a new regimen.

settings.tooltip_text: Apply a small amount behind the ear or on the inner elbow. Wait 24-48 hours. If no redness or irritation appears, proceed with regular use.
